summary: This document outlines the Standard Operating Procedure for conducting internal audits within the company's Quality Management System. It details auditor qualifications, planning processes, audit activities, and the classification of findings such as major or minor nonconformities. The procedure ensures compliance with international standards and regulatory requirements relevant to the organization's operations.
